description_long: This is a large, two-handed sword with a straight, double-edged blade that extends from a simple crossguard. The blade is long, flat, and tapers to a pointed tip, suggesting it is designed for slashing and thrusting. The handle is cylindrical, dark in color, and appears to be wrapped or textured for grip, ending in a faceted pommel. The crossguard is straight and unadorned, providing basic hand protection. The entire object has a dark, matte finish, giving it a utilitarian and somewhat modern appearance. There are no visible decorative elements or engravings on the blade, handle, or guard.
description: A large, straight-bladed two-handed sword with a simple crossguard and a dark, textured handle. The design is utilitarian and unadorned, with a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and the handle's profile.
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, dark, textured or wrapped, faceted pommel
